description: CompositionBlue jersey made of 100% recycled polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has a round neck, short raglan sleeves, stitch detailing and printed nike swoosh on the left chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsCrafted from soft polyester and engineered with Dri-Fit technology, this jersey from nike offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great choice to wear for your healthy runs or on casual days. Team it with trackpants or shorts and running shoes for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during the winter.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of chest 33"
